claims.summary: A control marker followed by a relation across a newline may be missed.
claims.disposition: Verified first_word_after already skips arbitrary non-word separators, and added an exact newline-separated represents regression.

claims.summary: A four-level nested delimiter stack should preserve the marker and exact depth.
claims.disposition: Verified the bounded delimiter walker and added a regression asserting exact depth four in both aggregate and context receipt evidence.

claims.summary: NUL-delimited multipart hashing can alias different byte partitions.
claims.disposition: Implemented deterministic u64 big-endian part-count and part-length framing, exposed the framing name in diagnostics, and added the concrete embedded-NUL collision regression.

claims.summary: Marker cleanup aggregation and the known-token scope need exact verification.
claims.disposition: Verified single-pass longest raw matching, bounded context receipts, removed/preserved aggregation, and the explicitly scoped known-marker list through the 26-test marker suite.
